title: Hot Girl Summer
description:
A dazzling celebration of summer, sequins and showgirls!

It blew our minds. We’re still talking about it!" – TripAdvisor

Blackpool’s iconic drag show, loved by generations of partygoers.

Top 10% attraction worldwide with 35,000+ glowing reviews.

Voted #1 five years straight. Queens, cocktails, unforgettable chaos.

Every season’s a spectacle. Pick your moment and grab your seats.

Fuel the fun with a 3-course pre-show dinner, just £29.85 per person.

Your meal is served in Garbo’s, our cosy art deco restaurant, before the curtain rises and the show takes over.

The talent, the charm, the legs for days — these stars slay every night.
address: Funny Girls Show Venue Address, Online City, Country

The talent, the charm, the legs for days — these stars slay every night.

Meet the Cast

Carmen - Originally from Liverpool, she learned the art of the scathing one-line quip in the clubs of Liverpool city centre and across the UK before joining the Funny Girl’s family in 2006. See More

Luke - Leicester-born Luke, a global sensation, brings his electrifying dance journey from 'Spirit of the Dance' to the stages of Funny Girls, showcasing his diverse talent as a performer, cruise line artist, and choreographer. See More

Flexi Belle - Prepared to be amazed and in awe of the high kicking, drop splitting dancing DIVA that is Flexi Belle. Small but mighty she will leave you wanting more as she takes to the stage and dances the night away. See More

Phoenix Knights - Lewis Bolton, originally starting as a Bar Queen at Funny Girls, received professional training in musical theatre at Blackpool and the Fylde University. His passion for performance led him to explore various avenues. See More

Sebastian - Sebastian began showing love for the performing arts word at a young age. Growing up a child in Sweden, he took classes in dance, gymnastics, and even attended Norsholm’s youth circus school. See More

Jordan - Meet Jordan, the dynamic performer blending disco freestyle, diverse dance styles, and newfound aerial artistry, ready to captivate Funny Girls' stage with a whirlwind of talent and charm. See More

Andrea - Get ready to be enchanted by Andrea, the Italian charmer making his dazzling debut on the Funny Girls stage, bringing a touch of Sicilian magic to Blackpool! See More

Dinner & Show Experience

Fuel the fun with a 3-course pre-show dinner, just £29.85 per person.

Your meal is served in Garbo’s, our cosy art deco restaurant, before the curtain rises and the show takes over.

See Our Menu

The talent, the charm, the legs for days — these stars slay every night.

Meet the Cast

Carmen

Originally from Liverpool, she learned the art of the scathing one-line quip in the clubs of Liverpool city centre and across the UK before joining the Funny Girl’s family in 2006.

Luke

Leicester-born Luke, a global sensation, brings his electrifying dance journey from 'Spirit of the Dance' to the stages of Funny Girls, showcasing his diverse talent as a performer, cruise line artist, and choreographer.

Flexi Belle

Prepared to be amazed and in awe of the high kicking, drop splitting dancing DIVA that is Flexi Belle. Small but mighty she will leave you wanting more as she takes to the stage and dances the night away.

Phoenix Knights

Lewis Bolton, originally starting as a Bar Queen at Funny Girls, received professional training in musical theatre at Blackpool and the Fylde University. His passion for performance led him to explore various avenues.

Sebastian

Sebastian began showing love for the performing arts word at a young age. Growing up a child in Sweden, he took classes in dance, gymnastics, and even attended Norsholm’s youth circus school.

Jordan

Meet Jordan, the dynamic performer blending disco freestyle, diverse dance styles, and newfound aerial artistry, ready to captivate Funny Girls' stage with a whirlwind of talent and charm.

Andrea

Get ready to be enchanted by Andrea, the Italian charmer making his dazzling debut on the Funny Girls stage, bringing a touch of Sicilian magic to Blackpool!

Dinner & Show Experience

Fuel the fun with a 3-course pre-show dinner, just £29.85 per person.

Your meal is served in Garbo’s, our cosy art deco restaurant, before the curtain rises and the show takes over.

Wall ofLove

“Such good fun – the Christmas show was amazing, and we’re coming back every year!”

“An absolutely brilliant show – we loved every minute of it!”

“We visited this venue for a Fab night out, I can highly recommend the FUNNY GIRLS experience.”

“Funny Girls is a Blackpool institution; a must-see show.”

“Amazing night out! Table service is fabulous, staff very attentive. The show was spectacular!”

“Such a great atmosphere entertaining and funny.”

“The show was amazing, and we have seen some drag shows in our time and this was up there with the very best.”

“Unforgettable experience – we left with huge smiles on our faces.”

“Absolutely cracking night out!”

“Just superb ! Always the best night out.”
